## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.14.2

### Motion Notifications
- Writes Home Assistant event state after delayed recording-cache motion events are triggered, so `event.received` automations can see the completed event.
- Keeps the camera event blueprint sending a recording notification when playback metadata exists, even if cached media is not ready yet.
- Uses cached media as the mobile video attachment when available and falls back to the X-Sense Recordings playback link when only the recording URL is available.

### Options Flow
- Fixes the integration options page schema so Home Assistant can render the recording cache path field without a 500 error.
- Keeps recording cache paths limited to `/media` through options-flow validation instead of using a non-serializable schema validator.

### Documentation
- Updates the root README and all translated readmes with the corrected recording notification behavior.
- Adds a tracked APK evidence note so future APK-sensitive changes do not depend on temporary decompile folders.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for delayed cached motion events writing state after trigger.
- Adds blueprint coverage for cached media notifications and recording-link fallback notifications.
- Adds options-flow coverage for Home Assistant schema serialization and invalid recording cache path handling.
